title: Rubber Jar Opener Gripper Pads, 3 Pcs Multi Purpose Jar Bottle Can Lids Gripper Openers Reusable for Most Bottles, Seniors Weak Hands, Used as Kitchen Coasters
description:
About this item
Premium Material: Our bottle gripper opener pads are made of high-quality rubber material, which are resistant to twist, easy to clean, soft and durable, not easy to deform, have a long service life.
Practical Design: The rubber jar grippers for opening jars consists of a textured grip surface that is non-slip. Used to open how many sturdy jars, and prevent the bottle cap from scratching your fingers.
Easy to Use: It is also easy for you to clean up the grease, oil, or stains on the surface. Rubber jar gripper openers work great for children, women, seniors, etc. Allowing you to quickly unscrew the cap.
Wide Applications: The rubber lid opener gripper not only can be used as botte openner but also can work as round kitchen coasters, anti-scald pads, also great for wrapping hot handle/lids on the stovetop.
Package Includes: You will receive 3 pcs rubber gripper for opening jars and bottles, in 3 different shapes and colors, provide superior grip when opening jars & containers of all sizes, from large to small.
reviews_5s: Help to open all kinds of jars!!!Yo compre esto para una tía, que por problemas en sus manos no podía abrir bien botellas y pomos de cristal. Ella encantada con este kit que dice le resolvió su problema. Excelente material. Los colores llamativos hacen que su búsqueda en tu gaveta sea fácil. Definitivamente lo voy a comprar para mi.I hate to be without these things. I never have to screw around with lids that won’t come off. I’m ready for anything !Gets bottles and lids openedThey're such a relief to grab whenever I need help to open all sorts of objects from bottles to jars to remote control battery lids (some of those sliding battery compartment lids are very difficult to open & an effective friction beyond what a thumb can offer helps a lot)
reviews_1s: Very flimsy not high quality at all. Do no purchase these items.Cheap and flimsy
